# AI Incident Response Packet Template

Use this template when triaging a production AI incident or handing off containment, rollback, or follow-up work.

```yaml
workflow_mode: ai_incident_response
current_stage: ai-incident-response-desk
incident_id:
capability_id:
reported_at:
report_source:
severity:
impact:
affected_users:
affected_surfaces:
model_versions:
prompt_versions:
tool_versions:
retrieval_versions:
recent_changes:
timeline:
evidence:
provider_status:
telemetry_status:
eval_regression_status:
safety_privacy_impact:
containment_options:
containment_status:
rollback_options:
rollback_status:
comms_owner:
approval_state:
open_questions:
hard_halts:
soft_gaps:
validation_gates:
follow_ups:
ready_to_continue:
downstream_handoff_targets:
```
